item.name: cmt_devname
item.en: the string length range: 1~31, double quotes(") and backslash(\) are not supported

item.name: cmt_mac
item.en: rules: xx:xx:xx:xx:xx, xx are two hexadecimal chars, ex:00:14:97:FF:12:45, except 00:00:00:00:00:00ĄĸFF:FF:FF:FF:FF:FFĄĸmulticast(the lowest bit of the first byte is 1)

item.name: cmt_dhcp_enable
item.en: Enable: allocate ip dynamically, Diable: allocate ip statically

item.name: cmt_ip
item.en: rules: x.x.x.x, x:0~255 decimalism number, except x.x.x.0Ąĸx.x.x.255Ąĸ127 and 224~239 start

item.name: cmt_send_buf
item.en: Range: 10~4096, Unit: 10 Frames, if input 10, means 4096

item.name: discard_new
item.en: Discard New Data When Buffer Is Full

item.name: discard_old
item.en: Discard Old Data When Buffer Is Full

item.name: cmt_cloud_compress_size
item.en: Compress upload when buffer size reachs this value, range:1~255, unit:KB

item.name: cmt_cloud_compress_tmo
item.en: Compress upload when buffer time reachs this value, range:500~60000, unit:ms
